title: dryopteris cirrhosa
intro: Dryopteris cirrhosa, also known as the Leathery Male Fern, is a species of fern native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris cirrhosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made into a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to relieve symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions.
